title: Zeboron Delta
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Zeboron Delta''' was a building located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shador]], in the burrough of [[Fink's Hole]]. It provided a back-entrance into [[Zeboron Gamma]], through a doorway and up a staircase. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Zeboron Delta was a pile of rubble.

==Appearances==
*''[[Scoundrel's Luck]]''
